raw_consumer_statement: I lost my card on or around XX/XX/2023. I immediately called in and reported my card as lost as with Citi Best buy I do not have an app or purchase alerts. They also do not have a friendly mobile website. I reported my card lost right away the same day I realized it was lost. The charges occured in XXXX which is not a city I live in. The charge continued to occur up to 30 or more miles from my home address. I do not travel and am not traveling to " shop ''. I have more than enough proof i was not no where near where the charges occurred and will not pay for unauthorized charges when the credit card was lost and not in my possession.
